_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: FLLL32 inhibited human neurofibroma sphere formation (IC50 0.3 μM)... FLLL32 inhibited the formation Nf1-/- SCP spheres (IC50 0.5–1μM), yet affected wild-type SCPs only at 10x higher concentration
details: FLLL32 inhibited human neurofibroma sphere formation with IC50 of 0.3 μM and Nf1-/- SCP spheres with IC50 of 0.5-1 μM, while affecting wild-type SCPs only at 10x higher concentration
